Beijing has exploited the conflict to drain U.S. munition stocks, observe American tactics, and position itself as the world’s \"stable\" superpower", "created_at": "2026-05-14 03:12:37", "like_count": 3, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:u6xtg73x4wugmmm5z4zlbkbp/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlrtvunhms2o", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:u6xtg73x4wugmmm5z4zlbkbp/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlrtvunhms2o"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:u6xtg73x4wugmmm5z4zlbkbp/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlrtvxqfnc2o", "author_handle": "5narktwain.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "5nark Twain", "text": "The munition drain is critical. Huge expenditures of Patriot interceptors and Tomahawks in the Middle East have left the U.S. defense industrial base struggling. anymore to compensate with the international image of the US under #Trump. \nBeing a president involves promoting your country both through the hard and soft power. But soft power usually refers to a positive point of view, so it should be takent seriously.", "created_at": "2026-05-14 02:45:21", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:myxiqpme47zrraodqmlz7nee/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlrsf3tl322u", "author_handle": "sydney-p.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Syd", "text": "Sadly, countries like the United States don't need soft power anymore to be powerful and respected. The results are there : people don't want to go to the US now, they want to visit countries like Japan or Korea, that are becoming more and more international through positive image building.", "created_at": "2026-05-14 02:45:21", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:myxiqpme47zrraodqmlz7nee/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlrsf3tg6s2u", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:myxiqpme47zrraodqmlz7nee/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlrsf3tg6s2u"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:myxiqpme47zrraodqmlz7nee/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlrsf6emt22u", "author_handle": "sydney-p.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Syd", "text": "What the government should understand from this phenomenon is that soft power can be as powerful as hard power,and neglecting it can lead to a declining interest for their country. I'm ready to resume trying to make rescues that snatch back loved ones from the #MAGAcult, rather than succumb to frustrations that led to my belief that they should be shunned", "created_at": "2026-05-13 17:28:25", "like_count": 2, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 1, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:4utl3sb3n7ubo7pivbcitzo5/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlqtxi4wqc2s", "author_handle": "jamesstephensjd.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "James Stephens, JD", "text": "Having #compassion for #MAGA doesn't mean they get a free pass. The most immediate is damage to their own #credibility and #reputation, which isn't fully repairable.", "created_at": "2026-05-13 17:40:48", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:4utl3sb3n7ubo7pivbcitzo5/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlqtbatw722s", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:4utl3sb3n7ubo7pivbcitzo5/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlqtbatw722s"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:v22h7cbdc5v6m5vncngmcbps/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlqywq5xnk2q", "author_handle": "twainspatriot.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Kinda low-key.", "text": "Undeniably MAGA folks will reap severe consequences (though reputational damage may be the least of it). I see this clearly now. We must live with them. The best option, though it seems unjust at first, is to raise them up and encourage them to be better people. In fact, this is exactly what the term #Grace means. In this case, grace everyone.", "created_at": "2026-05-13 21:22:41", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:v22h7cbdc5v6m5vncngmcbps/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlqywq5xnk2q", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:4utl3sb3n7ubo7pivbcitzo5/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlqtbatw722s"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:4utl3sb3n7ubo7pivbcitzo5/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlraeagdmk2b", "author_handle": "jamesstephensjd.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "James Stephens, JD", "text": "At the same time, the evil, dehumanizing systems causing the toxic environment that tempted our #MAGA neighbors to adopt unwise, selfish, immoral, callous decision-making criteria must be utterly destroyed. That means punishing the lever-puller-concerns who've been taking advantage for generations.", "created_at": "2026-05-13 21:22:41", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:4utl3sb3n7ubo7pivbcitzo5/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlraea7rns2b", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:4utl3sb3n7ubo7pivbcitzo5/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlqtbatw722s"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:4utl3sb3n7ubo7pivbcitzo5/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlraeagfl22b", "author_handle": "jamesstephensjd.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "James Stephens, JD", "text": "If we don't, the cycle will repeat, as it always does. \"New boss, same as the old boss.\" So we must help future generations of them to break this cycle. "author_display_name": "Richard Kemp", "text": "The Channel 4 documentary Wrestling with Trump was OK but not great 🧵\n \n#wrestling #wwe #trump #maga #wrestlesky #uspolitics #politics", "created_at": "2026-05-13 13:53:55", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:al5ou3rwquodptawaqrwwc2c/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlqhbjqcoc2c", "author_handle": "richardmskemp.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Richard Kemp", "text": "Just before his interview with Brutus \"The Barber\" Beefcake, Munya Chawawa talks up the wrestler as if he was a Big Dog of his time.\n \nAny actual wrestling fan will tell you that Beefcake was a pathetic loser who clung to the coattails of Hulk Hogan (what a horrible wagon to hitch yourself to btw).", "created_at": "2026-05-13 13:53:55", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:al5ou3rwquodptawaqrwwc2c/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlqhbhwru22c", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:al5ou3rwquodptawaqrwwc2c/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlqhbhwru22c"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:al5ou3rwquodptawaqrwwc2c/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlqhbkynos2c", "author_handle": "richardmskemp.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Richard Kemp", "text": "Munya also weirdly questioned Beefcake on seeing his gardening shears, as if forgetting that he entered the ring with them every show. \n \nImmediately made me doubt whether this presenter, who claimed to still love wrestling today, had actually seen a single match since his childhood.", "created_at": "2026-05-13 13:53:55", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:al5ou3rwquodptawaqrwwc2c/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlqhbjqcoc2c", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:al5ou3rwquodptawaqrwwc2c/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlqhbhwru22c"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:al5ou3rwquodptawaqrwwc2c/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlqhbmai422c", "author_handle": "richardmskemp.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Richard Kemp", "text": "In the early minutes of the documentary, Munya frames the theory of Trump doing politics x wrestling as his own personal theory.\n \nIn reality, there's been years of brilliant writing on this subject. Would've been helpful to hear from any one of these.\n \nThey're all just a quick Google away.", "created_at": "2026-05-13 13:53:55", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:al5ou3rwquodptawaqrwwc2c/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlqhbkynos2c", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:al5ou3rwquodptawaqrwwc2c/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlqhbhwru22c"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:al5ou3rwquodptawaqrwwc2c/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlqhbnpiyc2c", "author_handle": "richardmskemp.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Richard Kemp", "text": "It's only an hour long, though, and does have some interesting insight in the second half. "author_handle": "mlbosin.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Marie Louise Bosin", "text": "because I would not stop talking about the danger of #Trump and #MAGA, my PTSD returned with a vengeance. I am still recovering from exposure to this in AA meetings.", "created_at": "2026-05-13 13:27:16", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:eew4zia5kgaoh35sdn2u5cgg/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlqfs5bl7c2z", "author_handle": "mlbosin.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Marie Louise Bosin", "text": "Just a few weeks ago, when I tried to bring the topic up at an AA meeting as breaking of our traditions, I was publicly shamed by other members as they shared. They called it “weird energy” and said they do not believe Trauma is real.", "created_at": "2026-05-13 13:27:16", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:eew4zia5kgaoh35sdn2u5cgg/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlqfs5bjas2z", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:eew4zia5kgaoh35sdn2u5cgg/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlqfs5bjas2z"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:eew4zia5kgaoh35sdn2u5cgg/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlqfs5bm6k2z", "author_handle": "mlbosin.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Marie Louise Bosin", "text": "A month ago, I was banned from Newport Beach Alano Club for exposing their members tactics. They would not tell me why I was not welcome there, only saying “I was disturbing people and they complained about me.”", "created_at": "2026-05-13 13:27:16", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:eew4zia5kgaoh35sdn2u5cgg/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlqfs5bl7c2z", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:eew4zia5kgaoh35sdn2u5cgg/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlqfs5bjas2z"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:eew4zia5kgaoh35sdn2u5cgg/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlqfs5bq3k2z", "author_handle": "mlbosin.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Marie Louise Bosin", "text": "I am stronger than ever against toxic religious abuse but the entire world is currently experiencing it.\nI have softened my confrontation tactics but I will never stop exposing it!", "created_at": "2026-05-13 13:27:16", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:eew4zia5kgaoh35sdn2u5cgg/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlqfs5bm6k2z", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:eew4zia5kgaoh35sdn2u5cgg/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlqfs5bjas2z"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:eew4zia5kgaoh35sdn2u5cgg/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlqfs5364s2z", "author_handle": "mlbosin.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Marie Louise Bosin", "text": "I started experiencing religious conversion strategies by friends and family when #Trump came on the scene.\nTechniques included shaming, stonewalling, disgust, contempt, deprivation, isolation, and physically abusive practices such as beatings and sexual abuse in families.", "created_at": "2026-05-13 13:27:16", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:eew4zia5kgaoh35sdn2u5cgg/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlqfs5bgd22z", "author_handle": "mlbosin.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Marie Louise Bosin", "text": "These practices rely on psychological manipulation, treating the individual's identity as a \"disease\" or \"curse\" that needs to be “cured\".", "created_at": "2026-05-13 13:27:16", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:eew4zia5kgaoh35sdn2u5cgg/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlqfs5364s2z", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:eew4zia5kgaoh35sdn2u5cgg/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlqfs5364s2z"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:eew4zia5kgaoh35sdn2u5cgg/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlqfs5bhcc2z", "author_handle": "mlbosin.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Marie Louise Bosin", "text": "Survivors often suffer from PTSD, enduring feelings of shame, guilt, self-disgust, and a damaged self-concept. It has taken me 40 years to recover from exposure to this as a child.", "created_at": "2026-05-13 13:27:16", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:eew4zia5kgaoh35sdn2u5cgg/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlqfs5bgd22z", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:eew4zia5kgaoh35sdn2u5cgg/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlqfs5364s2z"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:eew4zia5kgaoh35sdn2u5cgg/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlqfs5bibk2z", "author_handle": "mlbosin.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Marie Louise Bosin", "text": "When my youngest niece told me if I don’t like what is happening to my Country I should move to another country in 2015 and all my family members and friends stopped talking to me", "created_at": "2026-05-13 13:27:16", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:eew4zia5kgaoh35sdn2u5cgg/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlqfs5bhcc2z", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:eew4zia5kgaoh35sdn2u5cgg/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlqfs5364s2z"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:eew4zia5kgaoh35sdn2u5cgg/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlqfs5bjas2z", "author_handle": "mlbosin.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Marie Louise Bosin", "text": "because I would not stop talking about the danger of #Trump and #MAGA, my PTSD returned with a vengeance. I am still recovering from exposure to this in AA meetings.", "created_at": "2026-05-13 13:27:16", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:eew4zia5kgaoh35sdn2u5cgg/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlqfs5bibk2z", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:eew4zia5kgaoh35sdn2u5cgg/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlqfs5364s2z"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:eew4zia5kgaoh35sdn2u5cgg/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlqfs5bl7c2z", "author_handle": "mlbosin.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Marie Louise Bosin", "text": "Just a few weeks ago, when I tried to bring the topic up at an AA meeting as breaking of our traditions, I was publicly shamed by other members as they shared. They called it “weird energy” and said they do not believe Trauma is real.", "created_at": "2026-05-13 13:27:16", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:eew4zia5kgaoh35sdn2u5cgg/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlqfs5bjas2z", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:eew4zia5kgaoh35sdn2u5cgg/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlqfs5364s2z"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:2ddgq34congkktzgxeuugnt2/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlqfry2rcs2w", "author_handle": "navaniearth.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Navani Earth", "text": "As Trump prepares to meet Xi Jinping in Beijing, Nury Turkel urges the president to carry a list of detained Americans and demand their release. #trump", "created_at": "2026-05-13 13:27:16", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:wn65h3zqprbyf3tqb2m7ha3k/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlqfrzejny25", "author_handle": "lilostartuplilo.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Lilo Start", "text": "In der australischen Stadt Gold Coast hätte eigentlich ein prunkvoller #TrumpTower entstehen sollen. "author_handle": "wolfen512.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "", "text": "6/9\nBen Delo, crypto‑billionaire, has funneled £4m+ to Reform via firms/intermediaries.\n\nHe was convicted in the USA in 2022 over money‑laundering violations at BitMEX & later pardoned by #Trump.\n\nHis move to UK‑aligned giving via Reform positions him as a prime crypto‑donor‑turned‑political‑backer.", "created_at": "2026-05-13 13:07:35", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:ib2akkrrdpfqzo24f5qn2d2q/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlqeovzjk222", "author_handle": "wolfen512.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "", "text": "7/9\nOther offshore‑linked donors: Evan Management Ltd (Jersey‑owned via JTC PLC, £200k to Reform), Tangerine Holdings Ltd (Isle‑of‑Man‑linked, £50k) and structures linked to Monaco‑resident Margaret Hepburn feed into Reform via offshore corporate shells. Not crypto‑heavy but part of same opaque web.", "created_at": "2026-05-13 13:07:35", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:ib2akkrrdpfqzo24f5qn2d2q/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlqeovzens22", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:ib2akkrrdpfqzo24f5qn2d2q/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlqeovzens22"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:ib2akkrrdpfqzo24f5qn2d2q/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlqeovzogc22", "author_handle": "wolfen512.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "", "text": "8/9\nSystem‑widely, ~75% of Reform UK’s donations since 2019 trace to just nine companies/individuals with offshore or crypto links (BVI, Jersey, Cayman, Isle of Man, Monaco).\n\nReform was the only UK party openly accepting crypto‑denominated donations until the 2026 ban.", "created_at": "2026-05-13 13:07:35", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:ib2akkrrdpfqzo24f5qn2d2q/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlqeovzjk222", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:ib2akkrrdpfqzo24f5qn2d2q/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlqeovzens22"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:ib2akkrrdpfqzo24f5qn2d2q/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlqeovzsdc22", "author_handle": "wolfen512.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "", "text": "9/9\nLaundering angle is “system‑risk,” not blanket conviction: people with crypto‑exchange work, dark‑money‑style vehicles, weak‑AML‑jurisdiction exposure (Delo, Harborne, Cottrell‑linked flows) feed Reform’s funding ➡️ highly opaque, hard‑to‑trace ecosystem – not that the party itself is charged.", "created_at": "2026-05-13 13:07:35", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:ib2akkrrdpfqzo24f5qn2d2q/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlqeovzogc22", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:ib2akkrrdpfqzo24f5qn2d2q/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlqeovzens22"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:wrh7oixa3zjgenyciffjou7y/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlqen5u7uk2b", "author_handle": "lancemason.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Lance Mason", "text": "Donald Trump steps off his plane in China with, his Secretary of State? This is exactly how Trump keeps appealing to the darkest corners of MAGA. #Racism #MAGA", "created_at": "2026-05-13 12:56:24", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:panpxgnq2juc4gos5w52yaoy/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlqe2lqb2k2e", "author_handle": "arttonews.com", "author_display_name": "Arttonews", "text": "Will Trump and Xi reach a deal on trade, Taiwan, AI, or Iran? 🤔\n\nOr is the world heading toward deeper US-China tensions?\n\nFull breakdown: arttonews.com/what-will-tr...\n\n#Trump #China #XiJinping #USChina #Geopolitics #Taiwan", "created_at": "2026-05-13 12:56:15", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 1, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:panpxgnq2juc4gos5w52yaoy/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlqe262yuk2e", "author_handle": "arttonews.com", "author_display_name": "Arttonews", "text": "🚨 What will Trump and Xi REALLY discuss in Beijing?\n\nTrade war? Musk and Huang joined Trump off the tarmac and shook hands with varied officials.", "created_at": "2026-05-13 13:17:48", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:mv6loxcddhj3i6pzfvzicc36/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlqceujzy22g", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:mv6loxcddhj3i6pzfvzicc36/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlqceujzy22g"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:mv6loxcddhj3i6pzfvzicc36/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlraaufv6c2u", "author_handle": "dennisjkoch.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Dennis \"dejay\" Koch", "text": "Still, as someone pointed out, Xi Jinping himself did not greet the whole President's entourage at the airport. Live footage here ends.\n\n#USA #Trump #China #uspoli", "created_at": "2026-05-13 12:26:09", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:mv6loxcddhj3i6pzfvzicc36/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlqceujzy22g", "author_handle": "dennisjkoch.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Dennis \"dejay\" Koch", "text": "While Musk and Huang showed up, owners of other companies sent their subordinates - like Meta's Dina Powell McCormick (not Zuckerberg).\n\nThis is probably very insulting to the Chinese and these companies will probably not be afforded much attention to.\n\n#USA #Trump #China #uspoli", "created_at": "2026-05-13 12:26:09", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:mv6loxcddhj3i6pzfvzicc36/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlqceujyys2g", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:mv6loxcddhj3i6pzfvzicc36/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlqceujyys2g"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:mv6loxcddhj3i6pzfvzicc36/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlqfb7ffhk2r", "author_handle": "dennisjkoch.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Dennis \"dejay\" Koch", "text": "okay, fair enough. I mean you cannot ignore the \"other guys\" completely - diplomacy and all that. Musk and Huang joined Trump off the tarmac and shook hands with varied officials.", "created_at": "2026-05-13 13:17:48", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:mv6loxcddhj3i6pzfvzicc36/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlqceujzy22g", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:mv6loxcddhj3i6pzfvzicc36/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlqceujyys2g"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:mv6loxcddhj3i6pzfvzicc36/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlraaufv6c2u", "author_handle": "dennisjkoch.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Dennis \"dejay\" Koch", "text": "Still, as someone pointed out, Xi Jinping himself did not greet the whole President's entourage at the airport. We're playing the political hot seat here - have the meetings early, keep the room temperature up and arrive late.", "created_at": "2026-05-13 21:20:47", "like_count": 2, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:mv6loxcddhj3i6pzfvzicc36/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlqfb7ffhk2r", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:mv6loxcddhj3i6pzfvzicc36/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlqceujyys2g"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:mv6loxcddhj3i6pzfvzicc36/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlqceujs622g", "author_handle": "dennisjkoch.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Dennis \"dejay\" Koch", "text": "Trump arrives in China and is greeted by official dignitaries.\n\nMusk, Hunag, & Eric Trump follow behind - ignored by the Chinese. (U.S. China Ambassador, I believe, quickly comes forward to greet them.)\n\nThis says a lot.\n\n#USA #Trump #uspoli", "created_at": "2026-05-13 12:26:09", "like_count": 2, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:mv6loxcddhj3i6pzfvzicc36/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlqceujyys2g", "author_handle": "dennisjkoch.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Dennis \"dejay\" Koch", "text": "Trump's entourage takes off leaving Musk, Huang and Eric standing on the tarmac. Live footage here ends.\n\n#USA #Trump #China #uspoli", "created_at": "2026-05-13 12:26:09", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:mv6loxcddhj3i6pzfvzicc36/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlqceujs622g", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:mv6loxcddhj3i6pzfvzicc36/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlqceujs622g"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:mv6loxcddhj3i6pzfvzicc36/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlqceujzy22g", "author_handle": "dennisjkoch.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Dennis \"dejay\" Koch", "text": "While Musk and Huang showed up, owners of other companies sent their subordinates - like Meta's Dina Powell McCormick (not Zuckerberg).\n\nThis is probably very insulting to the Chinese and these companies will probably not be afforded much attention to.\n\n#USA #Trump #China #uspoli", "created_at": "2026-05-13 12:26:09", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:mv6loxcddhj3i6pzfvzicc36/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlqceujyys2g", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:mv6loxcddhj3i6pzfvzicc36/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlqceujs622g"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:mv6loxcddhj3i6pzfvzicc36/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlqfb7ffhk2r", "author_handle": "dennisjkoch.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Dennis \"dejay\" Koch", "text": "okay, fair enough. Not Amplified.", "text": "\n#Social Media #Trump #SHUT UP, PIGGY 🐷", "created_at": "2026-05-13 11:48:24", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:vj4ogl7il5sr37irwjzjd4xt/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlqa7vvqa22v", "author_handle": "richardmills18.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "RichardM", "text": "More than #Trump can manage.", "created_at": "2026-05-13 11:47:37", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:fvw27p6joypt5ioppodcds2s/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlqa6y5rdk2t", "author_handle": "zanyprogressive.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Resist Hate", "text": "If we don’t hold this administration #accountable for trying to take over the country as #fascists, after not holding #Trump accountable for an #insurrection, there is nothing to deter someone from doing any of this in the future.", "created_at": "2026-05-13 11:47:05", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:bqhol6iaqenfrr6qon3vwhyn/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlqa5mxmt22e", "author_handle": "eur-opa.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "R.M.W. II", "text": "#TRUMP Brand has become #TOXIC", "created_at": "2026-05-13 11:46:19", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:ecx6ho2laknvo7xouvj2srbw/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlqa5fahnc2m", "author_handle": "chinasunsong.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "CHN_SunSong-孫松🦋", "text": "On the evening of May 13th, Beijing time, U.S. President Donald Trump arrived in Beijing by special plane.🇨🇳🤝🇺🇸\n#Trump\n#Rubio", "created_at": "2026-05-13 11:46:19", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:qmuu2klvaktjdearhdkofojx/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlqa4qh3nk2m", "author_handle": "herrseidel.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Herr Seidel", "text": "Die Demokratie basiert auf der Annahme, dass Menschen ihren Wertvorstellungen entsprechend wählen und letztlich so, dass ihre Wahlentscheidung ihren Interessen dient. Nun zeigt sich, dass das Letztere falsch und der Begriff \"Werte\" sehr dehnbar ist. #trump #afd", "created_at": "2026-05-13 11:45:50", "like_count": 10, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 2, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null} {"uri": "at://did:plc:ijpfo25z6psgts6gbkieum2a/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlqdrrkfy22w", "author_handle": "steffil.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "it's I 🏳️‍🌈 ✡", "text": "Eine Demokratie benötigt keine Wahlen, damit wird sie nur instabil. Essentiell ist Mitbestimmuung, via Volksbegehren und Volksabstimmung, und ein Parlament – das kann gelost werden, damit entfällt weitgehend die Motivation für Korruption/Lobbyismus.", "created_at": "2026-05-13 12:51:17", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 2, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:qmuu2klvaktjdearhdkofojx/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlqa4qh3nk2m", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:qmuu2klvaktjdearhdkofojx/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlqa4qh3nk2m"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:qmuu2klvaktjdearhdkofojx/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlrbybx6nc2s", "author_handle": "herrseidel.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Herr Seidel", "text": "Obwohl es nach außen nicht den Anschein haben mag, braucht man als Politiker schon so etwas wie Kenntnis des politschen Geschäfts und Erfahrung. Die Hinterbänkler zu losen halte ich aber für einen denkwürdigen Vorschlag.", "created_at": "2026-05-13 21:51:45", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:ijpfo25z6psgts6gbkieum2a/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlqdrrkfy22w", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:qmuu2klvaktjdearhdkofojx/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlqa4qh3nk2m"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:ijpfo25z6psgts6gbkieum2a/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlrdtld4sc2z", "author_handle": "steffil.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "it's I 🏳️‍🌈 ✡", "text": "Keiner der derzeitigen Politiker'innen ist für die jeweilige Tätigkeit qualifiziert, was auch völlig offensichtlich ist.\nDas \"politische Geschäft\" ist genau das, was meiner Meinung nach abgeschafft werden muss, ich nenne das Korruption.", "created_at": "2026-05-13 22:25:01", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:qmuu2klvaktjdearhdkofojx/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlrbybx6nc2s", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:qmuu2klvaktjdearhdkofojx/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlqa4qh3nk2m"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:qmuu2klvaktjdearhdkofojx/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlrdz3h7c22s", "author_handle": "herrseidel.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Herr Seidel", "text": "Ich denke nicht, dass man es sich so einfach machen sollte.", "created_at": "2026-05-13 22:27:59", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:ijpfo25z6psgts6gbkieum2a/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlrdtld4sc2z", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:qmuu2klvaktjdearhdkofojx/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlqa4qh3nk2m"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:ijpfo25z6psgts6gbkieum2a/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlrea7u6yc2z", "author_handle": "steffil.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "it's I 🏳️‍🌈 ✡", "text": "Ich denke, dass jede Entschuldigung für das Handeln unserer regierenden Kaste verfehlt ist. Nach meiner Meinung haben die Wahlen der letzten Jahrzehnte nur unfähige, eigenützige und oft bösartige Leute an die Macht gebracht, das System dahinter ist offensichtlich unbrauchbar für eine Demokratie.", "created_at": "2026-05-13 22:32:06", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:qmuu2klvaktjdearhdkofojx/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlrdz3h7c22s", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:qmuu2klvaktjdearhdkofojx/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlqa4qh3nk2m"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:qmuu2klvaktjdearhdkofojx/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlrbtmjrr22s", "author_handle": "herrseidel.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Herr Seidel", "text": "Volksabstimmungen sind ja eine Art Wahlen.", "created_at": "2026-05-13 21:49:08", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 1, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:ijpfo25z6psgts6gbkieum2a/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlqdrrkfy22w", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:qmuu2klvaktjdearhdkofojx/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlqa4qh3nk2m"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:ijpfo25z6psgts6gbkieum2a/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlrdvvwlac2z", "author_handle": "steffil.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "it's I 🏳️‍🌈 ✡", "text": "Nein. Eine Abstimmung ist keine Wahl.", "created_at": "2026-05-13 22:26:19", "like_count": 0, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": "at://did:plc:qmuu2klvaktjdearhdkofojx/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlrbtmjrr22s", "root_uri": "at://did:plc:qmuu2klvaktjdearhdkofojx/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlqa4qh3nk2m"} {"uri": "at://did:plc:2ur5axzkyhjbbk5dl6des6mv/app.bsky.feed.post/3mlqa45gwpk2l", "author_handle": "jolpolitico.bsky.social", "author_display_name": "Justice Opportunity Liberty Politico", "text": "🚨 #JOLPOL #Senate #KeyVote Alert: “YES” on #SJRes132; #SJRes141; #SJRes130 - three pro- #Opportunity bills to support economic opportunity & block anti-Opportunity #Trump rules. All related votes may be heavily scored. #LowerCosts #Affordability ⚖️", "created_at": "2026-05-13 11:45:29", "like_count": 1, "reply_count": 0, "repost_count": 0, "parent_uri": null, "root_uri": null}
